mano_cua.result_summary: resourceTimeline视图中资源行与事件行存在严重高度不对齐。通过DevTools对比左侧ec-resource行与右侧ec-days行的实际渲染高度：Row 0-13对齐正常(diff=0)，但Row 14左侧高度694px而右侧仅135px，差异559像素。左右两侧flex-basis值虽然设置相同(61px/34px)，但最后一行的实际渲染高度严重不匹配，导致资源列表与时间线事件区域垂直错位
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Comprehensive height comparison reveals Row 14 has left side height=694px vs right side height=135px (diff=559px). Rows 0-13 are perfectly aligned (diff=0 for all). The last resource row in the sidebar renders at 694px while its corresponding timeline row is only 135px, causing severe vertical misalignment between the resource list and timeline event area.
